Appearances:
Plaintiff Conard House Incorported is present. Represented by
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant William Mills is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee representing the defendants through Limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec -03--2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
